text: V1 - Onboarding flow: pain assessment body map UI

V1 - Progress visualization: charts, before/after posture comparison

Innovation - Desk Pain Score Card: PDF report generator & shareable infographic
Innovation - Posture before/after progress camera with AI overlay lines
Innovation - Silent Office Mode: discreet waist-up exercises UI
Innovation - Crunch Mode: sprint-aware reduced exercise UI
Innovation - Night Recovery Mode: evening guided routine screen
Innovation - ADHD-optimized mode: ultra-short bursts, dopamine UI
Innovation - AirPods posture detection: head tilt real-time widget
Innovation - Posture Heritage Report: annual data story visualization
Growth - TikTok 'Rate My Desk Setup' video recording + share feature
Growth - Social share: 30-day transformation progress card generator
Growth - Referral program UI: invite friends for free month
V1 - AI posture scan API: MediaPipe Pose landmark detection pipeline
V1 - Desk setup analyzer API: YOLO object detection + geometric analysis
V1 - Pain tracker API: CRUD for pain_logs with TimescaleDB hypertable
V1 - Exercise library API: exercise CRUD with zone/job/difficulty filtering
V1 - Smart break scheduling: calendar API integration (Google + Outlook)
V1 - User profile API: preferences, job type, work setup, subscription tier
V1 - Authentication service: Firebase/OAuth with JWT token management
V1 - PostgreSQL schema: users, pain_logs, posture_scans, desk_scans tables
V1 - Redis cache: session data, streak state, break reminder scheduling
V1 - S3/Cloudflare R2: posture scan photos, desk scan photos storage
V1 - Push notifications: Firebase Cloud Messaging integration
V1 - RevenueCat subscription management integration
V2 - Pain prediction engine: XGBoost model per body zone per user
V2 - Pain correlation analytics: pain vs productivity vs mood queries
V2 - Pain prediction model: 14-day training data minimum pipeline
V2 - Team/corporate tables: teams, team_members, admin permissions
V2 - Slack integration: team stretch sync webhook + channel bot
V2 - Apple Health / Google Fit data sync API
V2 - Red flag triage: AI symptom pattern detection for medical referrals
V2 - Exercise difficulty adaptation: progressive overload algorithm
V2 - HSA/FSA receipt generator: monthly pain summary PDF API
V3 - Continuous webcam posture monitoring: desktop app + ML pipeline
V3 - Wearable integration: Apple Watch + Garmin data ingestion
V3 - PT telehealth integration: video session API + booking system
V3 - AI program builder: Claude API NLP→exercise mapping engine
V3 - Enterprise white-label: multi-tenant architecture + SSO
V3 - AirPods Pro motion sensor API: head tilt posture detection
V3 - Sleep position coach: phone accelerometer data processing
V3 - Analytics events pipeline: PostHog self-hosted integration
Innovation - Pain trigger diary AI: Claude NLP pattern extraction from logs
Innovation - Nomad mode: location-detected setup recommendation engine
Innovation - Team stretch sync: real-time WebSocket multi-user sessions
Growth - SEO content API: dynamic landing pages from exercise data
Growth - Referral tracking: unique codes + attribution pipeline
Growth - Affiliate product API: ergonomic product catalog + click tracking
Infrastructure - Go microservices: auth, user, pain, exercise, scan services
Infrastructure - Kong/Nginx API gateway with rate limiting
Infrastructure - TimescaleDB hypertable for pain_logs time-series
Infrastructure - ML server: Python FastAPI serving TF/XGBoost models
QA - Onboarding flow testing: all 10 screens + edge cases
QA - AI posture scan accuracy testing across iPhone 12/13/14/15
QA - Desk setup analyzer: 50+ desk photos for detection accuracy
QA - Exercise video playback: streaming, offline, all quality levels
QA - Calendar break timing: edge cases (DST, timezone, back-to-back)
QA - Pain tracker: body map tap accuracy, intensity slider UX
QA - Progress visualization: chart data accuracy verification
QA - Emergency pain relief: 90-sec timer accuracy, zone targeting
QA - Cross-platform: iOS 15/16/17 + Android 12/13/14 compatibility
QA - Mobile responsiveness: iPhone SE to iPad Pro layout testing
QA - Push notification delivery: FCM reliability across platforms
QA - Subscription flow: RevenueCat purchase, restore, cancel, refund
QA - Offline mode: exercise caching, pain log queue, sync on reconnect
QA - Accessibility testing: VoiceOver, TalkBack, dynamic text sizing
QA - Performance: cold start <2s, exercise video load <1s, TFLite <100ms
QA - Privacy: on-device processing verification, no photo leaks
Research - Reddit deep-dive: analyze top 100 complaints from 17 subreddits
Research - Competitor analysis: PostureFlow, Upright, SitApp, StretchMinder, Stretchly
Research - User persona interviews: burned-out developer persona validation
Research - UX/designer persona: mouse-arm pain patterns validation
Research - Accountant persona: tax season crunch pain correlation study
Research - Student persona: budget ergonomic solutions mapping
Research - Digital nomad persona: location-variable pain pattern study
Research - Gamer persona: work+play combined screen pain analysis
Research - Market sizing: smart posture correction $4.28B by 2033 verification
Research - ASO keyword research: back pain, posture, desk worker search volume
Research - Pricing benchmark: competitor tiers, conversion rate benchmarks
Research - Corporate wellness: MSK disorder cost to employers validation
Research - Red flag symptom matrix: clinical validation with PT advisors
Research - Exercise library taxonomy: 30 starter exercises curation
Research - ADHD desk worker: 15-30% tech worker prevalence validation
Research - Retention benchmark: Day-7 45%, Day-30 28% targets validation
Research - Growth channels: Reddit ad costs, TikTok content strategy ROI
Research - Technical architecture: Flutter vs React Native decision matrix
Research - Go vs Node.js backend: performance benchmark for real-time features
Research - TFLite on-device: model size <8MB, inference <100ms feasibility
Product - V1 definition: core feature set, success criteria, launch timeline
Product - V2 growth features: prioritization matrix (impact vs effort)
Product - V3 advanced: technical feasibility assessment for AI features
Product - Monetization: free→pro conversion triggers and paywall design
Product - Onboarding optimization: 72% completion rate target strategy
Product - Retention loop: daily/weekly/monthly engagement cycle design
Product - Corporate sales deck: B2B value prop, ROI calculator, case studies
Product - Analytics: PostHog event taxonomy (30+ core events) definition
Product - Roadmap: $100K MRR milestone planning with key drivers
Product - Investment deck: $500K pre-seed pitch, use of funds breakdown
